<div class="features-grid-wrap reveal" id="features">
  <div class="sec-label" style="padding:40px 32px 0;justify-content:center;">De ce OneTouch</div>
  <h2 class="sec-title" style="padding:8px 32px 24px;text-align:center;">De ce să<br><em>alegi OneTouch?</em></h2>
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feat-card">
      <div class="feat-card-icon">🔋</div>
      <div class="feat-card-tag">Autonomie</div>
      <div class="feat-card-title">20H neîntrerupt</div>
      <div class="feat-card-desc">~4H muzică per cască la 50% volum. Carcasa 200mAh reîncarcă de mai multe ori — total ~20H utilizare.</div>
      <div class="feat-card-stats">
        <span><b>~4H</b> per cască</span>
        <span><b>~20H</b> total</span>
        <span><b>1.5H</b> încărcare</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="feat-card">
      <div class="feat-card-icon">📶</div>
      <div class="feat-card-tag">Conectivitate</div>
      <div class="feat-card-title">Conectare rapidă</div>
      <div class="feat-card-desc">Deschizi carcasa și se conectează singure. Rază 10 metri.</div>
      <div class="feat-card-stats">
        <span><b>BT 5.4</b></span>
        <span><b>10m</b> rază</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="feat-card">
      <div class="feat-card-icon">🎵</div>

      <div class="faq-item" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
        <div class="faq-q">
          <span>Cum plătesc comanda?</span>
          <span class="faq-icon">+</span>
        </div>
        <div class="faq-a">Plata se face <strong>online cu cardul</strong> în momentul plasării comenzii, în siguranță prin procesator de plăți securizat.</div>

        <div class="faq-q">

        </div>

      </div>

        <div class="faq-q">
          <span>Care este autonomia reală a bateriei?</span>

        </div>
        <div class="faq-a">Fiecare cască oferă aproximativ <strong>4 ore de muzică</strong> la 50% volum per încărcare. Carcasa de încărcare (200mAh) reîncarcă căștile de mai multe ori, oferind un <strong>total de ~20 ore</strong> de utilizare. Timpul de încărcare complet este de aproximativ <strong>1.5 ore</strong>.</div>

<script src="https://js.stripe.com/v3/"></script>

<script>
// REVIEW MODAL
let reviewStarVal=0;
function openReviewModal(){
  const m=document.getElementById('review-modal');
  m.style.display='flex';document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeReviewModal(){
  const m=document.getElementById('review-modal');
  m.style.display='none';document.body.style.overflow='';
  reviewStarVal=0;
  document.querySelectorAll('.rv-star').forEach(s=>s.style.color='rgba(255,215,0,0.25)');
  const n=document.getElementById('rv-nume');const e=document.getElementById('rv-email');const t=document.getElementById('rv-text');
  if(n)n.value='';if(e)e.value='';if(t)t.value='';
}
function setReviewStar(val){
  reviewStarVal=val;
  document.querySelectorAll('.rv-star').forEach(s=>{
    s.style.color=parseInt(s.dataset.val)<=val?'#ffd700':'rgba(255,215,0,0.25)';
    s.style.textShadow=parseInt(s.dataset.val)<=val?'0 0 10px rgba(255,215,0,0.6)':'none';
  });
}
function submitReview(){
  const nume=document.getElementById('rv-nume').value.trim();
  const email=document.getElementById('rv-email').value.trim();
  const text=document.getElementById('rv-text').value.trim();
  let valid=true;
  if(!reviewStarVal){document.getElementById('review-stars').style.outline='1px solid rgba(255,80,80,0.5)';valid=false;}
  if(!nume){document.getElementById('rv-nume').style.borderColor='rgba(255,80,80,0.5)';valid=false;}
  if(!email||!isValidEmail(email)){document.getElementById('rv-email').style.borderColor='rgba(255,80,80,0.5)';valid=false;}
  if(!text){document.getElementById('rv-text').style.borderColor='rgba(255,80,80,0.5)';valid=false;}
  if(!valid)return;
  const stele='★'.repeat(reviewStarVal)+'☆'.repeat(5-reviewStarVal);
  const msg=`*Recenzie OHR546*\n\n*Nume:* ${nume}\n*Email:* ${email}\n*Rating:* ${stele} (${reviewStarVal}/5)\n\n*Recenzie:*\n${text}`;
  const url=`https://wa.me/40725693799?text=${encodeURIComponent(msg)}`;
  window.open(url,'_blank');
  closeReviewModal();
}

// EMAIL VALIDATION
function isValidEmail(email){
  return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$/.test(email.trim());
}
function validateEmailField(el){
  const val=el.value.trim();
  if(val&&!isValidEmail(val)){
    el.style.borderColor='rgba(255,80,80,0.55)';
    el.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 3px rgba(255,80,80,0.07)';
    if(!el.nextElementSibling||!el.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('email-err')){
      const err=document.createElement('div');
      err.className='email-err';
      err.style.cssText='font-family:JetBrains Mono,monospace;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;color:rgba(255,100,80,0.8);margin-top:4px;padding-left:2px;';
      err.textContent='Adresă email invalidă';
      el.parentNode.insertBefore(err,el.nextSibling);
    }
  } else {
    el.style.borderColor='';
    el.style.boxShadow='';
    const err=el.nextElementSibling;
    if(err&&err.classList.contains('email-err'))err.remove();
  }
}

// REVIEWS TOGGLE
function toggleReviews(){
  const hidden=document.querySelectorAll('.reviews-hidden');
  const btn=document.getElementById('reviews-btn-text');
  const expanded=hidden[0].classList.contains('visible');
  hidden.forEach((el,i)=>{
    if(!expanded){
      setTimeout(()=>el.classList.add('visible'),i*80);
    } else {
      el.classList.remove('visible');
    }
  });
  if(expanded){
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const section=document.querySelector('.reviews-section');
      if(section)section.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'});
    },50);
  }
  btn.textContent=expanded?'Vezi toate recenziile ↓':'Ascunde recenziile ↑';
}

function openLegalModal(type){
  const d=legalData[type];
  document.getElementById('legal-title').textContent=d.title;
  document.getElementById('legal-content').innerHTML=d.content;
  const m=document.getElementById('legal-modal');
  m.style.display='flex';document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeLegalModal(){
  document.getElementById('legal-modal').style.display='none';
  document.body.style.overflow='';
}

// LIGHTBOX
function openLightbox(src){
  document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = src;
  const lb = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  lb.style.display = 'flex';
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeLightbox(){
  document.getElementById('lightbox').style.display = 'none';
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if(e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox(); });

// PROGRESS BAR
(function(){
  const bar = document.getElementById('progress-bar');
  if(!bar) return;
  window.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
    const scrollTop = window.scrollY;
    const docH = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    const pct = docH > 0 ? (scrollTop / docH) * 100 : 0;
    bar.style.width = pct + '%';
  }, {passive: true});
})();

// NAV DRAWER
function openNavDrawer(){
  const drawer = document.getElementById('nav-drawer');
  const panel = document.getElementById('nav-drawer-panel');
  if(!drawer || !panel) return;
  drawer.style.display = 'block';
  drawer.style.pointerEvents = 'all';
  setTimeout(()=>{ panel.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%) translateY(0)'; }, 10);
}
function closeNavDrawer(){
  const drawer = document.getElementById('nav-drawer');
  const panel = document.getElementById('nav-drawer-panel');
  if(!drawer || !panel) return;
  panel.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%) translateY(110%)';
  setTimeout(()=>{ drawer.style.display = 'none'; drawer.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; }, 350);
}
function navTo(id){
  closeNavDrawer();
  setTimeout(()=>{
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if(!el) return;
    const smallSections = ['colors', 'photo-band'];
    const offset = smallSections.includes(id) 
      ? window.innerHeight / 2 - el.offsetHeight / 2  // centrat pe ecran
      : 60; // navbar offset pentru sectiuni mari
    const top = el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - offset;
    window.scrollTo({top: Math.max(0, top), behavior:'smooth'});
  }, 350);
}

// PROGRESS LIQUID WAVE
(function(){
  const pctEl = document.getElementById('progress-pct');
  const waterLevel = document.getElementById('water-level');
  const wave1 = document.getElementById('wave1');
  const wave2 = document.getElementById('wave2');
  if(!pctEl || !waterLevel) return;
  
  function updateProgress(){
    const scrollTop = window.scrollY;
    const docH = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    const pct = docH > 0 ? Math.round((scrollTop / docH) * 100) : 0;
    
    // y=36 = gol, y=0 = plin
    const y = 36 - (pct / 100) * 36;
    waterLevel.setAttribute('y', y);
    
    // Valurile urmează nivelul apei
    if(wave1) wave1.style.transform = `translateY(${y - 4}px)`;
    if(wave2) wave2.style.transform = `translateY(${y - 2}px)`;
    
    pctEl.textContent = pct + '%';
  }
  
  window.addEventListener('scroll', updateProgress, {passive: true});
  updateProgress();
})();

// EFECT CARDURI CULORI - scale + neon la tap (mobile) si 3D tilt (desktop)
(function(){
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.color-card-img');
  
  cards.forEach(card => {
    // DESKTOP - 3D tilt
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
      const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
      const cx = rect.width / 2;
      const cy = rect.height / 2;
      const rotateX = ((y - cy) / cy) * -12;
      const rotateY = ((x - cx) / cx) * 12;
      card.style.transform = `perspective(600px) rotateX(${rotateX}deg) rotateY(${rotateY}deg) translateY(-6px) scale(1.03)`;
      card.style.boxShadow = `0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,0.15)`;
      card.style.borderColor = 'rgba(0,212,255,0.5)';
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      card.style.transform = '';
      card.style.boxShadow = '';
      card.style.borderColor = '';
    });

    // MOBILE - scale + neon glow pronuntat
    card.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
      card.style.transition = 'transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease';
      card.style.transform = 'scale(1.06) translateY(-4px)';
      card.style.boxShadow = '0 0 0 2px rgba(0,212,255,0.8), 0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,0.4), 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
      card.style.borderColor = 'rgba(0,212,255,0.9)';
    }, {passive:true});

    card.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
      setTimeout(()=>{
        card.style.transform = '';
        card.style.boxShadow = '';
        card.style.borderColor = '';
      }, 300);
    }, {passive:true});
  });
})();

// PARALLAX AURORA
(function(){
  const aurora = document.getElementById('aurora-wrap');
  if(!aurora) return;
  
  let ticking = false;
  
  window.addEventListener('scroll', ()=>{
    if(!ticking){
      requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
        const scrollY = window.scrollY;
        const heroH = aurora.closest('.hero')?.offsetHeight || 600;
        
        // Parallax doar cat timp esti in hero
        if(scrollY < heroH + 200){
          const offset = scrollY * 0.25; // mișcare lentă, subtilă
          aurora.style.transform = `translateY(${offset}px)`;
        }
        ticking = false;
      });
      ticking = true;
    }
  }, {passive: true});
})();

// COUNTER ANIMATION 20H
(function(){
  const el = document.getElementById('stat-20h');
  if(!el) return;
  
  let animated = false;
  
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if(entry.isIntersecting && !animated){
        animated = true;
        observer.disconnect();
        startCounter();
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' });
  
  observer.observe(el);
  
  function startCounter(){
    const target = 20;
    const duration = 3500;
    const start = Date.now();
    el.textContent = '1';
    
    // Neon border pe durata animatiei
    el.style.webkitTextStroke = '1px rgba(0,212,255,0.8)';
    el.style.textStroke = '1px rgba(0,212,255,0.8)';
    
    function easeOut(t){ return 1 - Math.pow(1 - t, 3); }
    
    function tick(){
      const elapsed = Date.now() - start;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const eased = easeOut(progress);
      const current = Math.max(1, Math.round(eased * target));
      
      el.textContent = current;
      
      // Culoare progresiva
      const intensity = Math.round(eased * 255);
      el.style.textShadow = `0 0 ${8 + eased*20}px rgba(0,212,255,${0.3 + eased*0.5})`;
      
      if(progress < 1){
        requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      } else {
        // IMPACT la 20!
        el.textContent = '20';
        triggerImpact();
      }
    }
    
    requestAnimationFrame(tick);
  }
  
  function triggerImpact(){
    // Border neon intens la impact
    el.style.webkitTextStroke = '2px rgba(0,212,255,1)';
    el.style.animation = 'counterFlash 0.8s ease forwards, counterShake 0.6s ease forwards';
    
    setTimeout(()=>{
      el.style.animation = 'counterNeon 1s ease forwards';
      el.style.webkitTextStroke = '1px rgba(0,212,255,0.5)';
    }, 800);
    
    setTimeout(()=>{
      el.style.animation = 'statPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite';
      el.style.webkitTextStroke = '1px rgba(0,212,255,0.4)';
    }, 1800);
  }
})();

// AURORA STARS
(function(){
  const wrap = document.getElementById('aurora-wrap');
  if(!wrap) return;
  for(let i=0;i<55;i++){
    const s = document.createElement('div');
    s.className = 'star';
    const size = Math.random()*2.5 + 0.5;
    s.style.cssText = `
      width:${size}px;height:${size}px;
      top:${Math.random()*85}%;
      left:${Math.random()*100}%;
      --dur:${2+Math.random()*4}s;
      --delay:-${Math.random()*4}s;
      --min-op:${0.1+Math.random()*0.2};
      --max-op:${0.6+Math.random()*0.4};
    `;
    wrap.appendChild(s);
  }
})();

// HERO COLOR SELECTOR
function switchHeroColor(color){
  document.querySelectorAll('.hero-color-img').forEach(img=>{
    img.classList.remove('active');
    if(img.dataset.color===color) img.classList.add('active');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.hcs-btn').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.classList.remove('active');
    if(btn.dataset.color===color) btn.classList.add('active');
  });
}

// AUTO TRANSITION
const heroColors = ['Negru', 'Alb', 'Bej'];
let heroIndex = 0;
let heroAutoInterval = setInterval(()=>{
  heroIndex = (heroIndex + 1) % heroColors.length;
  switchHeroColor(heroColors[heroIndex]);
}, 1500);

// Pause on manual click, resume after 5s
document.querySelectorAll('.hcs-btn').forEach(btn=>{
  btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    clearInterval(heroAutoInterval);
    heroIndex = heroColors.indexOf(btn.dataset.color);
    setTimeout(()=>{
      heroAutoInterval = setInterval(()=>{
        heroIndex = (heroIndex + 1) % heroColors.length;
        switchHeroColor(heroColors[heroIndex]);
      }, 1500);
    }, 5000);
  });
});

function toggleFaqSection(titleEl){
  const list=titleEl.parentElement.querySelector('.faq-list');
  const icon=titleEl.querySelector('.faq-section-icon');
  const isOpen=list.style.display==='block';
  list.style.display=isOpen?'none':'block';
  icon.style.transform=isOpen?'rotate(0deg)':'rotate(45deg)';
}
function toggleFaq(el){
  const isOpen=el.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item.open').forEach(i=>i.classList.remove('open'));
  if(!isOpen)el.classList.add('open');
}

// SHARE FUNCTIONS
const SHARE_URL = window.location.href;
const SHARE_TEXT = `🎧 Acer OHR546 — Căști Wireless Premium\n\n✅ Hi-Res Audio · Bluetooth 5.4\n✅ 20H autonomie · AI Noise Cancellation\n✅ Doar 119 lei · Livrare GRATUITĂ\n✅ Garanție 2 ani\n\n👉 Comandă aici: `;

function openShareModal(){
  const m = document.getElementById('share-modal');
  m.style.display = 'flex';
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeShareModal(){
  document.getElementById('share-modal').style.display = 'none';
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}
function shareWhatsApp(){
  const text = encodeURIComponent(SHARE_TEXT + SHARE_URL);
  window.open(`https://wa.me/?text=${text}`, '_blank');
  closeShareModal();
}
function shareFacebook(){
  const url = encodeURIComponent(SHARE_URL);
  const quote = encodeURIComponent('🎧 Acer OHR546 — Căști Wireless Premium · Hi-Res Audio · 20H autonomie · Doar 119 lei cu livrare gratuită!');
  window.open(`https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=${url}&quote=${quote}`, '_blank');
  closeShareModal();
}
function copyLink(){
  const fullText = SHARE_TEXT + SHARE_URL;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(fullText).then(()=>{
    const icon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
    const label = document.getElementById('copy-label');
    if(icon) icon.textContent = '✓';
    if(label){ label.textContent = 'Copiat!'; label.style.color = '#3ddc84'; }
    setTimeout(()=>{
      if(icon) icon.textContent = '🔗';
      if(label){ label.textContent = 'Copiază link'; label.style.color = ''; }
      closeShareModal();
    }, 1500);
  }).catch(()=>{
    const inp = document.createElement('input');
    inp.value = SHARE_TEXT + SHARE_URL;
    document.body.appendChild(inp);
    inp.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    document.body.removeChild(inp);
    closeShareModal();
  });
}
function shareInstagram(){
  const fullText = SHARE_TEXT + SHARE_URL;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(fullText).catch(()=>{
    const inp = document.createElement('input');
    inp.value = fullText;
    document.body.appendChild(inp);
    inp.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    document.body.removeChild(inp);
  });
  setTimeout(()=>{ window.open('https://www.instagram.com/', '_blank'); closeShareModal(); }, 300);
}

function acceptCookies(){
  localStorage.setItem('ohr546_cookie_consent','accepted');
  localStorage.setItem('ohr546_cookie_date',new Date().toISOString());
  const b=document.getElementById('cookie-banner');
  if(b){b.style.opacity='0';b.style.transition='opacity .3s';setTimeout(()=>b.style.display='none',300);}
}
function refuzCookies(){
  localStorage.setItem('ohr546_cookie_consent','refused');
  localStorage.setItem('ohr546_cookie_date',new Date().toISOString());
  localStorage.removeItem('ohr546_band_end');
  const b=document.getElementById('cookie-banner');
  if(b){b.style.opacity='0';b.style.transition='opacity .3s';setTimeout(()=>b.style.display='none',300);}
}

// PHOTO BAND INFINITE SCROLL
(function(){
  const track = document.getElementById('photo-track');
  const band = document.getElementById('photo-band');
  if(!track || !band) return;

  const SETS = 4; // number of repetitions
  let offset = 0;
  let dragging = false;
  let lastX = 0;
  let velX = 0;
  let raf;

  function oneSetW(){ return track.scrollWidth / SETS; }
  function clamp(o){ const sw = oneSetW(); return ((o % sw) + sw) % sw; }
  function apply(){ track.style.transform = `translateX(${-offset}px)`; }

  function tick(){
    if(!dragging){
      offset = clamp(offset + 0.5);
      apply();
    }
    raf = requestAnimationFrame(tick);
  }

  const getX = e => e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;

  band.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
    dragging = true; lastX = getX(e); velX = 0; e.preventDefault();
  });
  band.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
    dragging = true; lastX = getX(e); velX = 0;
  }, {passive:true});

  window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    if(!dragging) return;
    const cx = getX(e);
    velX = lastX - cx;
    offset = clamp(offset + velX);
    lastX = cx;
    apply();
  });
  window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
    if(!dragging) return;
    const cx = getX(e);
    velX = lastX - cx;
    offset = clamp(offset + velX);
    lastX = cx;
    apply();
  }, {passive:true});

  function stopDrag(){
    if(!dragging) return;
    dragging = false;
    let v = velX;
    (function momentum(){
      if(Math.abs(v) < 0.1) return;
      offset = clamp(offset + v);
      apply();
      v *= 0.9;
      requestAnimationFrame(momentum);
    })();
  }
  window.addEventListener('mouseup', stopDrag);
  window.addEventListener('touchend', stopDrag);

  // Start when images ready
  if(document.readyState === 'complete'){
    tick();
  } else {
    window.addEventListener('load', tick);
  }
})();

// ORDER MODAL
function openOrderModal(){document.getElementById('order-modal').classList.add('open');document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}
function closeOrderModal(){document.getElementById('order-modal').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item .qty-val').forEach(el=>el.textContent='0');document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item').forEach(i=>i.style.background='');const el=document.getElementById('order-total');if(el)el.innerHTML='0 <small>lei</small>';const det=document.getElementById('order-details');if(det)det.textContent='';}
function openOrderModalWithColor(c){openOrderModal();setTimeout(()=>{const names=['Negru','Alb','Bej'];document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item').forEach((item,i)=>{if(names[i]===c){const q=item.querySelector('.qty-val');if(q&&parseInt(q.textContent)===0)q.textContent='1';selectOrderColor(item,c);}});updateOrderTotal();},100);}
function selectOrderColor(el,color){document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item').forEach(i=>i.style.background='');if(el)el.style.background='rgba(0,212,255,0.06)';updateOrderTotal();}
function changeQty(btn,delta){const q=btn.parentElement.querySelector('.qty-val');let v=parseInt(q.textContent)+delta;if(v<0)v=0;if(v>10)v=10;q.textContent=v;updateOrderTotal();}
function updateOrderTotal(){let total=0,details=[];const names=['Negru','Alb','Bej'];document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item').forEach((item,i)=>{const qty=parseInt(item.querySelector('.qty-val').textContent);total+=qty*119;if(qty>0)details.push(qty+'x '+names[i]);});const el=document.getElementById('order-total');if(el)el.innerHTML=total+' <small>lei</small>';const det=document.getElementById('order-details');if(det)det.textContent=details.join(' · ');}
function submitOrder(){
  const detEl=document.getElementById('order-details');
  const totEl=document.getElementById('order-total');

  // Verificare - cel putin un produs selectat
  let total = 0;
  document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item .qty-val').forEach(el=>{ total += parseInt(el.textContent)||0; });
  if(total === 0){
    // Shake carduri + innrosi cantitate
    document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item').forEach(item=>{
      item.style.animation = 'none';
      item.style.transform = '';
      void item.offsetWidth;
      item.style.animation = 'buzzShake .5s ease both';
      // Inroseste cantitatea 0
      const qty = item.querySelector('.qty-val');
      if(qty && parseInt(qty.textContent) === 0){
        qty.style.color = 'rgba(255,60,60,1)';
        qty.style.textShadow = '0 0 8px rgba(255,0,0,0.9), 0 0 20px rgba(255,60,60,0.7), 0 0 40px rgba(255,0,0,0.4)';
        qty.style.transition = 'none';
        setTimeout(()=>{
          qty.style.color = '';
          qty.style.textShadow = '';
          qty.style.transition = '';
        }, 1500);
      }
      setTimeout(()=>{ item.style.animation = ''; item.style.transform = ''; }, 500);
    });
    // Reset buton la starea initiala
    const btn = document.querySelector('#order-modal .order-btn-main');
    if(btn){ btn.style.backgroundPosition = 'left center'; btn.style.transform = ''; }
    // Arata mesaj eroare
    const err = document.getElementById('order-error');
    if(err){
      err.style.display = 'block';
      setTimeout(()=>{ err.style.display = 'none'; }, 2500);
    }
    return;
  }
  const csDetails=document.getElementById('cs-details-text');
  const csTotal=document.getElementById('cs-total-text');

  // Build color dots rows
  if(csDetails){
    const colorMap={
      'Negru':'<span class="cs-dot cs-dot-negru"></span>',
      'Alb':'<span class="cs-dot cs-dot-alb"></span>',
      'Bej':'<span class="cs-dot cs-dot-auriu"></span>'
    };
    const text=detEl&&detEl.textContent?detEl.textContent:'Acer OHR546';
    const items=text.split('·').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    csDetails.innerHTML='<div class="cs-color-row">'+items.map(item=>{
      const colorMatch=Object.keys(colorMap).find(c=>item.includes(c));
      const dot=colorMatch?colorMap[colorMatch]:'';
      return '<span class="cs-color-item">'+dot+item+'</span>';
    }).join('')+'</div>';
  }

  if(csTotal&&totEl){
    const raw=totEl.innerText||totEl.textContent;
    csTotal.textContent=raw.trim();
  }
  closeOrderModal();
  const cm=document.getElementById('checkout-modal');
  if(cm){cm.style.display='flex';}
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeCheckoutModal(){
  const cm=document.getElementById('checkout-modal');
  if(cm)cm.style.display='none';
  // Reset success screen
  const body=document.querySelector('.checkout-body');
  const success=document.getElementById('checkout-success');
  if(body)body.style.display='';
  if(success)success.style.display='none';
  document.body.style.overflow='';
}
// STRIPE
const STRIPE_PK = 'pk_test_51TL595C1pFJbl9meRpcmk6tnq5A2BjLNzLqnAGSKbtm7bdgOk28Gj7GYsYVCXaPscyiRcaRM3oxP81XiwV0RjYPD00YP2P1t6I';
let stripe = null;
function getStripe(){
  if(!stripe && typeof Stripe !== 'undefined') stripe = Stripe(STRIPE_PK);
  return stripe;
}

function submitCheckout(){
  try {
    const fields=['cf-nume','cf-email','cf-telefon','cf-judet','cf-oras','cf-adresa','cf-cod'];
    let valid=true;

    // Verificare bifă T&C
    const tcCheck = document.getElementById('accept-tc');
    if(tcCheck && !tcCheck.checked){
      tcCheck.style.outline = '2px solid rgba(255,80,80,0.8)';
      setTimeout(()=>{ tcCheck.style.outline = ''; }, 2000);
      valid = false;
    }
    fields.forEach(id=>{
      const el=document.getElementById(id);
      if(!el)return;
      const val=el.value.trim();
      if(!val){
        el.style.borderColor='rgba(255,80,80,0.6)';
        el.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 2px rgba(255,80,80,0.2)';
        valid=false;
      } else if(id==='cf-email'){
        if(!isValidEmail(val)){el.style.borderColor='rgba(255,80,80,0.6)';el.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 2px rgba(255,80,80,0.2)';valid=false;}
        else{el.style.borderColor='rgba(0,212,255,0.15)';el.style.boxShadow='';}
      } else if(id==='cf-telefon'){
        const phoneReg=/^(\+40|0040|0)?7[0-9]{8}$/;
        if(!phoneReg.test(val.replace(/\s/g,''))){
          el.style.borderColor='rgba(255,80,80,0.6)';el.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 2px rgba(255,80,80,0.2)';
          el.placeholder='Format: 07xx xxx xxx';valid=false;
        } else {el.style.borderColor='rgba(0,212,255,0.15)';el.style.boxShadow='';}
      } else {
        el.style.borderColor='rgba(0,212,255,0.15)';el.style.boxShadow='';
      }
    });
    if(!valid) return;

    // Trimite email notificare prin EmailJS
    const numeVal = document.getElementById('cf-nume').value.trim();
    const emailVal = document.getElementById('cf-email').value.trim();
    const telefonVal = document.getElementById('cf-telefon').value.trim();
    const judetVal = document.getElementById('cf-judet').value.trim();
    const orasVal = document.getElementById('cf-oras').value.trim();
    const adresaVal = document.getElementById('cf-adresa').value.trim();
    const codVal = document.getElementById('cf-cod').value.trim();

    // Calculează produse selectate
    const allQtyEls2 = document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item .qty-val');
    const colorNames2 = ['Negru','Alb','Bej'];
    let produseText = '';
    let totalVal = 0;
    allQtyEls2.forEach((el, i) => {
      const qty = parseInt(el.textContent) || 0;
      if(qty > 0){
        produseText += qty + 'x ' + (colorNames2[i % 3] || 'Produs') + ' ';
        totalVal += qty * 119;
      }
    });
    if(!produseText) { produseText = '1x Produs'; totalVal = 119; }

    const orderId = 'OHR-' + Date.now().toString().slice(-6);

    // Trimite email
    if(typeof emailjs !== 'undefined'){
      emailjs.send('service_7cl5vyd', 'template_wg62cr5', {
        order_id: orderId,
        produse: produseText.trim(),
        total: totalVal,
        nume: numeVal,
        email_client: emailVal,
        telefon: telefonVal,
        judet: judetVal,
        oras: orasVal,
        adresa: adresaVal,
        cod_postal: codVal
      }).then(()=>console.log('Email trimis!'))
        .catch(err=>console.error('EmailJS error:', err));
    }

    // Calculează cantități
    const allQtyEls = document.querySelectorAll('.ocg-item .qty-val');
    const lineItems = [];
    let totalQty = 0;
    allQtyEls.forEach(el => {
      const qty = parseInt(el.textContent) || 0;
      if(qty > 0){ totalQty += qty; lineItems.push({price:'price_1TRtRqC1pFJbl9meq2KWVofb', quantity: qty}); }
    });
    if(totalQty === 0){ lineItems.push({price:'price_1TRtRqC1pFJbl9meq2KWVofb', quantity: 1}); totalQty=1; }

    // Verifică Stripe
    const s = getStripe();
    if(!s){
      const body = document.querySelector('.checkout-body');
      const success = document.getElementById('checkout-success');
      const numeEl = document.getElementById('cf-nume');
      const prenume = numeEl ? numeEl.value.trim().split(' ')[0] : '';
      if(body) body.style.display='none';
      if(success){
        success.style.display='block';
        const sub = success.querySelector('.success-sub');
        if(sub) sub.textContent = 'Comanda plasata! Iti multumim, ' + prenume + '! Te vom contacta in maxim 24h.';
      }
      return;
    }

    const btn = document.querySelector('#checkout-modal .order-btn-main');
    if(btn){ btn.disabled=true; btn.querySelector('.btn-text').textContent='Se proceseaza...'; }
    const emailEl = document.getElementById('cf-email');
    s.redirectToCheckout({
      lineItems: lineItems,
      mode: 'payment',
      successUrl: window.location.href.split('?')[0] + '?success=true',
      cancelUrl: window.location.href.split('?')[0] + '?canceled=true',
      customerEmail: emailEl ? emailEl.value.trim() : '',
      locale: 'ro',
    }).then(result=>{
      if(result.error){
        if(btn){ btn.disabled=false; btn.querySelector('.btn-text').textContent='Plaseaza comanda'; }
        console.error('Stripe error: ' + result.error.message);
      }
    });
  } catch(err){
    console.error('Checkout error:', err);
    const body = document.querySelector('.checkout-body');
    const success = document.getElementById('checkout-success');
    if(body) body.style.display='none';
    if(success) success.style.display='block';
  }
}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')closeOrderModal();});

// STRIPE SUCCESS/CANCEL HANDLER
(function(){
  const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
  if(params.get('success')==='true'){
    // Track purchase in GA4
    if(typeof gtag !== 'undefined'){
      gtag('event', 'purchase', {
        transaction_id: params.get('session_id') || Date.now().toString(),
        value: 119,
        currency: 'RON',
        items: [{ item_id: 'OHR546', item_name: 'Acer OHR546', price: 119, quantity: 1 }]
      });
    }
    // Afișează mesaj de succes
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const modal = document.getElementById('checkout-modal');
      if(modal){
        modal.style.display='flex';
        const body=document.querySelector('.checkout-body');
        const success=document.getElementById('checkout-success');
        if(body)body.style.display='none';
        if(success)success.style.display='block';
      }
    }, 500);
  }
})();

// CONTACT MODAL
const contactData={whatsapp:{icon:'💬',title:'WhatsApp',desc:'Vei fi redirecționat către WhatsApp.',link:'https://wa.me/40725693799',label:'Deschide WhatsApp →'},phone:{icon:'📞',title:'Apel telefonic',desc:'Apasă mai jos pentru a iniția un apel la +40 725 693 799.',link:'tel:+40725693799',label:'Sună acum →'},instagram:{icon:'📸',title:'Instagram',desc:'Urmărește-ne pe Instagram pentru noutăți și oferte exclusive.',link:'https://www.instagram.com/onetouchohr?igsh=MWx2MHB5ZmU5NnYyOQ%3D%3D&utm_source=qr',label:'Deschide Instagram →'}};
function openContactModal(type){
  const d=contactData[type];
  document.getElementById('modal-icon').textContent=d.icon;
  document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent=d.title;
  document.getElementById('modal-desc').textContent=d.desc;
  const lnk=document.getElementById('modal-link');
  lnk.textContent=d.label;
  if(type==='phone'){
    lnk.href='#';
    lnk.onclick=function(e){ e.preventDefault(); window.location.href='tel:+40725693799'; return false; };
  } else {
    lnk.href=d.link;
    lnk.onclick=null;
    lnk.target='_blank';
  }
  const modal=document.getElementById('contact-modal');
  modal.style.display='flex';
  modal.onclick=e=>{if(e.target===modal)closeContactModal();};
}
function closeContactModal(){document.getElementById('contact-modal').style.display='none';}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')closeContactModal();});

// MARQUEE
(function(){const band=document.getElementById('marquee-band');if(!band)return;const tracks=band.querySelectorAll('.marquee-track');let paused=false,dragging=false,startX=0,offset=0,velX=0,lastClientX=0,lastMoveTime=0;function trackWidth(){return tracks[0]?tracks[0].scrollWidth/2:1000;}
function getSpeed(){return trackWidth()/(40*1000);}
function applyOffset(px){const w=trackWidth();px=((px%w)+w)%w;tracks.forEach(t=>{t.style.transform=`translateX(-${px}px)`;});}
let animSpeed=0;
function animLoop(){if(!paused&&!dragging){offset=(offset+animSpeed*16)%trackWidth();applyOffset(offset);}requestAnimationFrame(animLoop);}
tracks.forEach(t=>{t.style.animation='none';t.style.transform='translateX(0)';});
animSpeed=getSpeed()*2;requestAnimationFrame(animLoop);
function getX(e){return e.type.includes('touch')?e.touches[0].clientX:e.clientX;}
band.addEventListener('mousedown',e=>{dragging=true;startX=getX(e);lastClientX=startX;band.style.cursor='grabbing';e.preventDefault();});
band.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{dragging=true;startX=getX(e);lastClientX=startX;},{passive:true});
window.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{if(!dragging)return;const cx=getX(e);const dx=lastClientX-cx;velX=dx/Math.max(Date.now()-lastMoveTime,1);lastMoveTime=Date.now();lastClientX=cx;offset=((offset+dx)%trackWidth()+trackWidth())%trackWidth();applyOffset(offset);});
window.addEventListener('touchmove',e=>{if(!dragging)return;const cx=getX(e);const dx=lastClientX-cx;lastClientX=cx;offset=((offset+dx)%trackWidth()+trackWidth())%trackWidth();applyOffset(offset);},{passive:true});
window.addEventListener('mouseup',e=>{if(!dragging)return;dragging=false;band.style.cursor='default';const totalDx=Math.abs(getX(e)-startX);if(totalDx<8){paused=!paused;return;}let v=velX*12;function momentum(){if(Math.abs(v)<0.1||dragging)return;offset=((offset+v)%trackWidth()+trackWidth())%trackWidth();applyOffset(offset);v*=0.92;requestAnimationFrame(momentum);}momentum();});
window.addEventListener('touchend',()=>{dragging=false;});
})();

// URGENCY TIMER
(function(){const KEY='ohr546_band_end',DUR=24*60*60*1000;function getEnd(){let e=localStorage.getItem(KEY);if(!e||Date.now()>parseInt(e)){e=Date.now()+DUR;localStorage.setItem(KEY,e);}return parseInt(e);}
function pad(n){return String(n).padStart(2,'0');}
function tick(){let diff=getEnd()-Date.now();if(diff<=0){localStorage.removeItem(KEY);diff=DUR;}const h=Math.floor(diff/3600000),m=Math.floor((diff%3600000)/60000),s=Math.floor((diff%60000)/1000);const elH=document.getElementById('ub-h'),elM=document.getElementById('ub-m'),elS=document.getElementById('ub-s');if(elH)elH.textContent=pad(h);if(elM)elM.textContent=pad(m);if(elS)elS.textContent=pad(s);}
tick();setInterval(tick,1000);
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
